title: polygala revoluta
intro: Polygala revoluta, also known as Yin Yang Huo or Chinese polypodium, is a type of flowering plant native to Asia, particularly in China and Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala revoluta include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Polygala revoluta is often combined with other plants, such as Astragalus and Licorice root, to create teas, capsules, or tonics that promote overall well-being.
